name: column_name
description: Column header as it appears in the source CSV. Case-preserved. (package_id, column_name) is the logical PK.

name: semantic_type
description: LLM-inferred semantic type, e.g. 'currency_cad', 'fiscal_year', 'province'. NULL when undecidable; not part of any controlled vocabulary.

name: description
description: English LLM-generated column description. Source text embedded into `embedding`.

name: sample_values
description: Up to 10 representative distinct values sampled from raw.rows. Empty when the column is uniformly NULL or sampling yielded nothing. The cap is enforced by the enrichment loader, not the schema.

name: embedding
description: Dense embedding vector over `description`. Same shape and dimension constraints as semantic.datasets.embedding.

name: generated_at
description: Wall-clock time of the enrichment run that produced this row.
